# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
We actively maintain and provide security updates for the current major branch version of our core action and docker runtimes.

## Reporting a Vulnerability
Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues. Instead, transmit clear diagnostic writeups directly via email to our security handling routing queue at `security@sorobanops.net`. We will acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and coordinate remediation loops before public disclosures.
